_comment: Cookiecutter-style variable manifest. Each key is a template token referenced as {{ key }} in template/ and stacks/. List values are multiple-choice (first = default). String values may reference earlier keys (e.g. {{ project_slug }}) to derive a default. The generator (bin/generate.py) also computes a handful of derived tokens — see docs/ANATOMY.md.
project_tagline: One-line description of what this project does.
commit_scopes: backend frontend migrations docs ci build
